description: Per-partial tabbed panel. OSC section: waveform selector (SAW/SQR/PW-SQR/TRI/SINE/NOISE/SP-SAW/PCM), pitch controls (coarse/fine), pulse width, super saw detune. Filter section: type selector (6 modes), cutoff, resonance, envelope (A/D/S/R), key follow. Amp section: level, velocity, envelope (A/D/S/R). Build as one component, instantiate 3 times.
title: Web: SN-S Partial editor (OSC + Filter + Amp)
